title: malvastrum capense var. balsamicum
intro: Malvastrum capense var. balsamicum, also known as Balsam Malva, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, characterized by its distinctive balsam-like resin and medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Balsam Malva include the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Balsam Malva include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
